# archestra_role (Data Source)

Looks up an existing Archestra role by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing role by name
data "archestra_role" "developer" {
  name = "Developer"
}

# Reference the role's ID and permissions
output "developer_role_id" {
  value = data.archestra_role.developer.id
}

output "developer_permissions" {
  value = data.archestra_role.developer.permissions
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role to look up

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Role identifier
- `permissions` (List of String) List of permissions in format 'resource:action'
